title: D&D campaign notes web viewer
description: Web-based tool for managing and visualizing Dungeons & Dragons campaign notes, designed for multi-party use with role-based content visibility.
The system allows structured world and session note organization with support for markdown rendering, enabling readable and maintainable campaign documentation.

A key feature is selective content visibility, allowing different player groups or individual players to access only relevant in-world information, supporting multiple parallel campaigns within a shared system.
The tool was developed primarily for personal use and is actively used to support multiple D&D parties by providing a centralized hub for worldbuilding and session tracking.
